name: mentorminds-contracts
description: MentorMinds Stellar Smart Contracts - Local Development Environment

scripts.local:reset: npm run local:stop && docker volume rm mentorminds-contract_stellar_data 2>/dev/null || true && npm run local:start
scripts.local:status: docker-compose ps && echo '--- Horizon: http://localhost:8000' && echo '--- Soroban RPC: http://localhost:8003' && echo '--- Friendbot: http://localhost:8002'
scripts.optimize: soroban contract optimize --wasm escrow/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/mentorminds_escrow.wasm && soroban contract optimize --wasm contracts/verification/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/mentorminds_verification.wasm && soroban contract optimize --wasm contracts/oracle/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/mentorminds_oracle.wasm && soroban contract optimize --wasm contracts/timelock/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/mentorminds_timelock.wasm

author: MentorMinds Team
